# rememberJoinedNetworks

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that determines whether to remember all joined Wi-Fi networks unless the user specifies otherwise when joining a particular Wi-Fi network.

## Declaration

```swift
var rememberJoinedNetworks: Bool { get set }
```

## Configuring Settings

- **requireAdministratorForAssociation**: A Boolean value that determines whether to require an administrator password to change networks.
- **requireAdministratorForPower**: A Boolean value that determines whether to require an administrator password to change the interface power state.
- **requireAdministratorForIBSSMode**: A Boolean value that determines whether to require an administrator password to create a computer-to-computer network.
